title: Gay Mayeux
compiled_truth: Gay Mayeux is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-08-04 to 2002-01-11), Gay Mayeux sent 9 and received 44 emails, totalling 53 interactions. Top correspondents: [J  Kean](people/j-kean) (5), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (5), [Mark Koenig](people/mark-koenig) (4), [Andrew Fastow](people/andrew-fastow) (4), [Ben Glisan](people/ben-glisan) (4).
